actionMessage.partialLoadFailed: Partial data load failed. Available data retained.
actionMessage.pluginSaveFailedNoWorkflow: Plugin config save failed: workflow not loaded
actionMessage.remoteBatchStarted: Remote batch started: from batch {{startBatch}}, {{totalItems}} items, {{batchSize}} per batch
actionMessage.batchStopRequested: Batch stop requested (takes effect after current batch completes)
actionMessage.batchStopNodeRequested: Batch stop requested (takes effect after current node receives stop signal)
actionMessage.nodeSaveFailedNoWorkflow: Node config save failed: workflow not loaded
actionMessage.nodeSaveFailedNodeNotFound: Node config save failed: workflow node not found({{nodeId}})
actionMessage.nodeSaveFailedEmptyFields: Node config save failed: title/Agent cannot be empty
actionMessage.nodeSaveFailedInvalidDep: Node config save failed: invalid dependency({{depId}})
actionMessage.nodeSaveFailedParallelGroupDep: Node config save failed: parallel group dependency not allowed({{depId}})
actionMessage.routeSaveFailedMaxAllowed: Route policy save failed: allowed max 5
actionMessage.routeSaveFailedInvalidTarget: Route policy save failed: invalid routing target({{route}} -> {{targetId}})
actionMessage.groupSaveFailedEmptyId: Group save failed: group ID cannot be empty
actionMessage.groupSaveFailedMinMembers: Group save failed: at least 2 members required
actionMessage.nodeAddFailedNoWorkflow: Add node failed: workflow not loaded
actionMessage.nodeAddFailedEmptyFields: Add node failed: node ID/title/Agent cannot be empty
actionMessage.nodeAddFailedDuplicateId: Add node failed: duplicate node ID({{nodeId}})
actionMessage.groupAddFailedNoWorkflow: Add group failed: workflow not loaded
actionMessage.groupAddFailedEmptyId: Add group failed: group ID cannot be empty
actionMessage.groupAddFailedDuplicateId: Add group failed: duplicate group ID({{groupId}})
actionMessage.groupAddFailedMinMembers: Add group failed: at least 2 members required
actionMessage.nodeDeleteFailedNoWorkflow: Delete node failed: workflow not loaded
actionMessage.nodeDeleteFailedMinNodes: Delete node failed: at least one node required
actionMessage.groupDeleteFailedNoWorkflow: Delete group failed: workflow not loaded
actionMessage.groupDeleteFailedNotFound: Delete group failed: group not found({{groupId}})

validation.mixedEdgeTypes: Node {{nodeId}} has both dependency and route outgoing edges, save blocked
validation.routeMustContainYesNo: Node {{nodeId}} must include yes and no routes when routing is enabled
validation.yesMainlineMaxOne: Node {{nodeId}} can have at most 1 yes mainline dependency edge
validation.yesCannotBeRouteEdge: Node {{nodeId}} yes cannot be saved as a route edge
validation.routeMustTargetBranch: Node {{nodeId}} route {{route}} must target branch node or branch group
validation.routeTargetMustBeOne: Node {{nodeId}} route {{route}} must have exactly 1 branch target
validation.groupMinMembers: Group {{groupId}} must have at least 2 members
validation.nodeNotInGroup: Node {{nodeId}} is not in its declared group {{groupId}}
validation.groupCannotDirectConnect: Group {{groupId}} cannot connect directly to member nodes
validation.groupMemberNoDirectDep: Group {{groupId}} members cannot depend on each other directly
validation.groupEntryCannotDirectConnect: Group {{groupId}} entry node cannot connect directly to members
validation.workflowHasCycle: Workflow contains a cycle, cannot save
